firmware.notes: Stage 1 ADC/filter firmware with RAW, MA, EMA, and cascaded IIR LPF/HPF/BPF filters. Does not include bootloader.
Stage 2 IMU raw streaming firmware. Edge Impulse classification hook is present but disabled until the motion-recognition accelerometer Arduino library is installed.
Stage 2 IMU firmware with the Edge Impulse Tutorial: Continuous motion recognition accelerometer model enabled. Labels: idle, snake, updown, wave.
Stage 3 ADC PPG heart-rate firmware. Reads A0-A7 at 32 Hz, runs a 15 s trained HR regression model from PPG-DaLiA features, and streams PPG/HR serial lines.
